verdict.rationale: Composite trust score: 62.5% (Grade C). Strengths: operational health, schema compliance, consumption track record. Weaknesses: proof integrity. Producer is usable with noted caveats. Review risk factors before integrating.

consumption_track_record.detail: 1 consumer(s), 8295 signals, 23d span, 100% uptime; attestation present (age 104h)

artifact_currency.detail: health_report: LIVE (1h); proof_surface: EXPIRED (362h); activity_feed: RECENT (2h); attestation: STALE (104h)

risk_factors.description: Binary accuracy 51.5% is near coin-flip (50%). Edge is modest and may not survive transaction costs.
risk_factors.mitigation: Weight signals conservatively. Use ensemble with other sources. Monitor accuracy drift via proof protocol.

risk_factors.description: Only 1 downstream consumer(s). No multi-consumer diversity to validate signal quality independently.
risk_factors.mitigation: Acknowledge single-consumer risk in your integration. Plan independent validation of signal accuracy.

risk_factors.description: Proof surface is 362h (15d) old. Recent accuracy may differ.
risk_factors.mitigation: Request the producer regenerate proof_surface.json with current forward-test data.

risk_factors.description: Proof quality dimension scored 30.8% (D). Proof surface may be stale or accuracy marginal.
risk_factors.mitigation: Request proof surface refresh. Cross-check with your own signal resolution.

risk_factors.description: All artifacts are producer-generated. This evaluation checks structural validity and cross-consistency but cannot independently verify signal correctness.
risk_factors.mitigation: Run your own signal resolution against market data to validate accuracy claims.

risk_factors.description: This evaluation is a snapshot. Producer health can change between evaluations.
risk_factors.mitigation: Set up recurring trust evaluations via monitoring contract.

integration_checklist.action: Clone the signal schema repository to understand the signal format.
integration_checklist.verification_command: git clone https://github.com/sendoeth/pf-signal-schema.git && python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('pf-signal-schema/signal_schema.json')); print('Schema version:', s.get('title', 'OK'))"
integration_checklist.expected_outcome: Schema file loads and prints title.

integration_checklist.action: Fetch or generate the latest health report for the producer.
Run this trust gateway to get an adoption verdict.
integration_checklist.expected_outcome: Prints trust evaluation summary with verdict.

integration_checklist.action: Verify the trust evaluation passes zero-trust checks.
Review risk factors and decide whether to proceed with integration.
integration_checklist.verification_command: python3 -c "import json; e=json.load(open('/tmp/my_evaluation.json')); v=e['verdict']['recommendation']; risks=[r for r in e['risk_factors'] if r['severity'] in ('CRITICAL','HIGH')]; print(f'Verdict: {v}, Critical/High risks: {len(risks)}')"
integration_checklist.expected_outcome: Verdict is ADOPT or ADOPT_WITH_CAVEATS with 0 CRITICAL risks.

integration_checklist.action: Copy the minimum viable integration template and configure it.
integration_checklist.expected_outcome: Template type is minimum_viable_integration with empty dependencies.

integration_checklist.action: Start the adapter and consume first batch of signals.
integration_checklist.expected_outcome: Adapter skeleton code prints without errors.

integration_checklist.action: Configure post-integration monitoring per the monitoring contract.
integration_checklist.verification_command: python3 -c "import json; e=json.load(open('/tmp/my_evaluation.json')); m=e['monitoring_contract']; print(f'Check every {m["check_interval_hours"]}h, {len(m["alert_thresholds"])} alert(s), {len(m["escalation_policy"])} escalation level(s)')"

alert_thresholds.action: Check producer liveness. May be transient downtime.
Producer may be offline. Check health report. Consider pausing consumption.
Producer is DEAD (7+ days). Pause consumption. Re-evaluate trust.
Error rate above 20%. Pause consumption. Request producer investigation.
Health dropped below C threshold. Review risk factors.
Health at D/F level. Pause consumption. Full re-evaluation required.
Proof surface older than 14 days. Request refresh.
Proof surface older than 30 days. Accuracy claims are unverifiable.

escalation_policy.action: Log alert. Increase monitoring frequency to 15 minutes.

escalation_policy.condition: Any HIGH alert fires or 2+ MEDIUM alerts simultaneous.
escalation_policy.action: Notify operator. Reduce signal weight in downstream decisions.
Pause signal consumption. Trigger full trust re-evaluation. Notify operator immediately.

monitoring_contract.re_evaluation_trigger: Any CRITICAL alert, OR composite health below 0.30, OR 30+ days since last evaluation. Run: python3 evaluate_trust.py --health-report <latest> --proof-surface <latest> --activity-feed <latest> -o re_eval.json

verdict.composite_trust_score.description: Primary input to composite trust score.

proof_integrity.total_resolved.description: Total resolved signals in proof surface.

schema_compliance.score.description: Schema conformance score from health report.

consumption.total_signals.description: Total signals consumed across all consumers.

consumption.uptime_ratio.description: Fraction of days with successful deliveries.

consumption.span_days.description: Days between first and most recent consumption.

attestation.generated_at.description: When the consumption attestation was generated.

items.description: This evaluation is a snapshot. Trust can degrade between evaluations.
items.bias_magnitude: Transient failures between evaluations are invisible.

items.description: All input artifacts are producer-generated. Structural validity is checked but factual accuracy cannot be independently verified without market data.
items.bias_magnitude: A producer could ship structurally valid but factually wrong artifacts.

items.description: Only one downstream consumer exists. No multi-consumer diversity to cross-validate.
items.bias_magnitude: Multi-consumer validation would provide stronger evidence.

items.description: Proof surface is 362h (15d) old. Accuracy may have changed since last proof generation.
items.bias_magnitude: Historical proof may over- or under-state current accuracy.

items.description: Binary accuracy 51.5% is near coin flip. Edge is statistically significant but practically modest.
items.bias_magnitude: Transaction costs could eliminate the modest edge.
